text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hm. I guess it's time to replace my tracksuit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It feels tight in some places when I move. Looks
like I gained some muscle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. As always, meat reigns supreme. It's good
for your muscles, no doubt about it.

Curious, I take a look at the results of this
morning's physical, and...
choice_data_list:
Your muscle mass seems to have dropped a bit,
actually...

Your muscle mass seems to have dropped a bit,
actually...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: In other words, the increase is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And wipe that smirk off your face! Argh!

Narita Brian gets back into shape after some
grueling runs.
